headline: The documentation shift you're missing
primary_text:
Ever wonder how some clinicians never take work home?

They're not superhuman. They're not cutting corners. They're using JotPsych — the AI documentation tool built specifically for behavioral health.

Thousands of therapists now finish notes in minutes instead of hours. They record their sessions, and JotPsych generates HIPAA-compliant progress notes that capture their clinical voice.

The result? 1-2 hours back in their day. Every single day.

Your colleagues have already made the switch. Ready to see what you've been missing?
